series_metadata.series_description: When the Ohio State Highway Patrol investigates an incident, the Office of Investigatives Services completes an HP-24L to obtain information during the response to the incident.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years plus current, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two years plus current, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain for two years plus current, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Burn
